title: Wider Stats Screen
description: Make the statistics screen item counts less likely to overlap
body: This mod spreads the columns in the "Items" section of the statistics menu farther from each other than in vanilla. This fixes the issue where having more than a million of some statistic would cause it to overlap with the column to its left. The width is configurable by editing the file `.minecraft/config/wider-stats-screen.txt`, so if it overflows on the sides of your screen, try decreasing that value or decreasing your GUI scale. Showcase of different scale values:
